form.title: Project Settings
form.demo_error: This is a demo site, you cannot update it

archive.restore_desc: The project is currently archived. It needs to be restored first to make any changes.
archive.archive_desc: The project will be archived. It will be hidden from the project list but can be restored later.
archive.archive_confirm_desc: This project will be archived. It will be hidden from the project list but can be restored later.
archive.restore_confirm_desc: This project will be restored. It will be visible in the project list and can be updated.
archive.demo_error: This feature is not available in demo

delete.title: Delete Project
delete.description: The project will be permanently deleted. This action is irreversible and can not be undone.
delete.warning: This project will be permanently deleted. This action is irreversible and can not be undone. All data associated with this project will be lost.
delete.confirm_desc: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete.
delete.demo_error: You cannot delete projects in demo mode.
delete.error_suffix: You are not authorized to delete this project.

move.title: Move Project
move.description: Move this project to another organization you belong to.

thumb.title: Project Thumbnail
thumb.description: Make your site image unique by adding a photo.
thumb.demo_error: This is a demo site, you cannot update it

repo.title: Git Repository
repo.description_connected: Your project is currently connected to a repository.
repo.description_disconnected: Connect your project to a Git repository to manage your content.
repo.disconnect_confirm_desc: This action will disconnect the repository from Sitepins. You can always connect it back later.
repo.error_no_repo_branch: Please select a repository and branch

branch.title: Branch Management
branch.description: Manage the branch used for your project content

schemas.title: Schema Management
schemas.description: Manage content schemas for your project
schemas.create_first_schema: Create your first schema by navigating to a content folder
schemas.edit_dialog_description: Modify your schema fields and their properties
schemas.error_validation: Please fix the highlighted fields and try again.

snippets.title: Snippet Management
snippets.description: Manage code snippets for your project
snippets.create_first_snippet: Create your first snippet to get started
snippets.delete_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this snippet? This action cannot be undone.

arrangement.title: Sidebar Arrangements
arrangement.description: Customize your content structure and layout
arrangement.get_started: Get started by adding a folder, file, or heading to customize your sidebar layout.
arrangement.edit_dialog_desc: Update the details of your arrangement item.
arrangement.error_renaming: There was an error renaming the file. Please try again.

errors.name_min_length: Name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.heading_min_length: Heading must be at least 2 characters.

commit.title: Commit Configuration
commit.description: Determine how commit messages are handled when you save changes
commit.custom_commit_desc: Enable this to write your own commit messages on save. When active, you can provide a custom message; otherwise, Sitepins will automatically generate one for you.

project.title: Edit Project Configuration
project.description: Configure your project settings. Click save to apply the changes.

suggestions.content: where your markdown files are stored
suggestions.media: where your media files are stored
suggestions.public: where your public files are stored
suggestions.config: where your config files are stored

summary.title: Project Configuration
summary.description: Quick overview of your current configuration
